name: Regis Resources Limited
description: Regis Resources Limited is a publicly listed Australian gold producer and explorer with a focus on high-quality assets in the Eastern Goldfields of Western Australia and the Central West of New South Wales. The company operates the Duketon Gold Project and holds a 30% interest in the Tropicana Gold Mine. Regis is committed to building a sustainable mid-tier gold business through organic growth, exploration success, and strategic acquisitions, maintaining a strong emphasis on operational excellence and responsible mining practices within the Australian mining sector.
